pipeline.title: 用 -er than / more than 比较事物

items.answer: My house is bigger than yours.
This book is more interesting than that one.
A car is faster than a bike.
This one is cheaper than that one.
She is a better student than me.
His car is newer than mine.

pipeline.title: A is [comparative] than B 比较级操练

items.answer: My house is bigger than yours.
This book is more interesting than that one.
This road is wider than that one.

pipeline.title: bigger / smaller / faster 一词多句

items.answer: My house is bigger than yours.
This city is bigger than that one.
Is your room bigger than mine?
My bag is smaller than yours.
A car is faster than a bike.
A plane is much faster than a train.

pipeline.title: compare / contrast / difference 一词多句

items.answer: In contrast, this one is cheaper.
What is the difference between the two?

pipeline.title: easier / heavier / happier 一词多句

items.answer: This exam is easier than the last one.
It is much heavier than I thought.

pipeline.title: 从比较到结论逐步扩展

levels.label: 比较
levels.en: This bag is bigger than that one.

levels.label: 加数量
levels.en: This bag is bigger than that one. It is also much cheaper.
levels.zh: 这个包比那个大。还便宜得多。

levels.label: 加结论
levels.en: This bag is bigger and much cheaper. In contrast, that one is too expensive. Let's get this one.
levels.zh: 这个包更大、便宜得多。相比之下，那个太贵了。买这个吧。
levels.highlight: In contrast, that one is too expensive. Let's get this one.

pipeline.title: 用 the -est / the most 表达最高级
pipeline.chunk: the best / the biggest / the most

items.answer: This is the best day ever!

items.zh: 她是我们班最好的学生。
items.answer: She is the best student in our class.

items.zh: 有史以来最伟大的演出。

pipeline.title: [A] is the [superlative] in/of [scope] 最高级操练

items.answer: This is the best restaurant in town.
He is the tallest boy in the class.

items.zh: 这是我看过的最美的地方。
items.answer: This is the most beautiful place I have seen.
That was the worst movie ever.

items.zh: 她是我认识的最善良的人。
items.answer: She is the most kind person I know.

pipeline.title: best / worst / most 一词多句

items.answer: This is the best day ever!
What is the worst that could happen?
What is the most important to you?

pipeline.title: biggest / smallest / fastest 一词多句

items.answer: What is the fastest way to get there?

pipeline.title: top / ultimate / greatest 一词多句
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 顶尖的/终极的/最伟大的

items.zh: 有史以来最伟大的演出。

pipeline.title: 从最高级到排名逐步扩展

levels.label: 最高级
levels.en: This is the best restaurant in town.

levels.label: 加对比
levels.en: This is the best restaurant in town. The second best is across the street.
levels.zh: 这是城里最好的餐厅。第二好的在街对面。
levels.highlight: The second best is across the street.

levels.label: 加推荐
levels.en: This is the best restaurant in town. You should definitely try it — it's the ultimate dining experience!
levels.zh: 这是城里最好的餐厅。你一定要试试——终极的用餐体验！
levels.highlight: You should try it — the ultimate experience!

pipeline.title: 用 There is / There are 描述存在
pipeline.chunk: There is / There are / There isn't

items.answer: There is a book on the desk.
There are two cats in the garden.
Is there a bank near here? — Yes, there is.
There isn't any milk in the fridge.
There is a lack of information.

pipeline.title: There is/are [noun] [place] 存在句操练

items.answer: There is a book on the desk.
There are many flowers in the garden.
There isn't any milk in the fridge.
There are many students in the room.

pipeline.title: there is / there are 一词多句

items.answer: There is a book on the desk.
There is a bank near here.
There are two cats in the garden.

pipeline.title: empty / full / crowded 一词多句
occupied / vacant / available 一词多句
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 被占用的/空着的/可用的

pipeline.title: 从存在描述到状态描述逐步扩展

levels.label: 说有
levels.en: There is a room on the second floor.

levels.label: 加状态
levels.en: There is a room on the second floor, but it is occupied.
levels.zh: 二楼有一个房间，但被占用了。

levels.label: 加替代
levels.en: There is a room on the second floor, but it is occupied. Is there a vacant room available?
levels.zh: 二楼有一个房间但被占用了。有空房间吗？
levels.highlight: Is there a vacant room available?

pipeline.title: 用 under / next to / between / behind 描述位置
pipeline.chunkMeaning: 在下面/在旁边/在之间/在后面

items.answer: The cat is under the chair.
The school is next to the park.

items.zh: 银行在商店和医院之间。
items.answer: The bank is between the store and the hospital.
The dog is behind the door.
The clock is above the door.
She is sitting among her friends.
The bike is against the wall.
The house is surrounded by trees.

pipeline.title: [subject] is [prep] [object] 位置介词操练

items.answer: The cat is under the chair.
The school is next to the park.
The bank is between the store and the hospital.
The dog is behind the door.

pipeline.title: under / above / below 一词多句

items.answer: The cat is under the chair.
The pen is under the desk.
The clock is above the door.
There is a village below the mountain.

pipeline.title: between / among / next to 一词多句

items.zh: 银行在商店和医院之间。
items.answer: The bank is between the store and the hospital.
It is something between the two.
She is sitting among her friends.
The school is next to the park.

pipeline.title: along / through / across 一词多句

items.answer: The hotel is across the street.

pipeline.title: 从位置描述到路线指引逐步扩展

levels.label: 给位置
levels.en: The bank is next to the park.

levels.label: 加方向
levels.en: The bank is next to the park. Go straight along this street and it's on your left.
levels.zh: 银行在公园旁边。沿着这条街直走，就在你的左边。

levels.label: 加参照
levels.en: The bank is next to the park. Go straight along this street. It's between the coffee shop and the bookstore.
levels.zh: 银行在公园旁边。沿着街直走。在咖啡店和书店之间。
levels.highlight: between the coffee shop and the bookstore.

pipeline.title: 用 as...as / too / enough 表达程度

items.answer: She is as tall as her brother.
This book is as good as that one.
He is not as tall as his father.
This coffee is too hot to drink.
This room is big enough for us.
This is even better than expected.
He is nowhere near as tall as you.

pipeline.title: [A] is as [adj] as [B] 同级比较操练

items.answer: She is as tall as her brother.
This book is as good as that one.
I am as fast as you.
This is not as expensive as that.
It is as good as it looks.

pipeline.title: as...as / not as...as 一词多句

items.answer: She is as tall as her brother.
I am as good as you.
It is as expensive as gold.
He is not as tall as his father.
It is not as hard as I thought.
Not as far as I imagined.

pipeline.title: too / enough 一词多句

items.answer: This coffee is too hot to drink.
This bag is too heavy to carry.
It's too late to go now.

items.zh: 这辆车对我来说够便宜了。
items.answer: This car is cheap enough for me.
This room is big enough for us.

pipeline.title: similar / equal / identical 一词多句
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 相似的/相等的/完全相同的

pipeline.title: 从同级比较到程度升级逐步扩展

levels.label: 同级
levels.en: This book is as good as that one.

levels.label: 加不够
levels.en: This book is as good as that one. But it is not as interesting as I expected.
levels.zh: 这本书和那本一样好。但没有我预期的有趣。
levels.highlight: But it is not as interesting as I expected.

levels.label: 加太过了
levels.en: This book is as good as that one, but not as interesting. Actually, some parts are too long to read.
levels.zh: 这本书和那本一样好但没有那么有趣。其实有些部分太长了读不下去。
levels.highlight: Actually, some parts are too long to read.

pipeline.title: 用 -ly 方式副词描述动作
pipeline.chunkMeaning: 快速地/小心地/慢慢地/好地

pipeline.title: [subject] [verb] [adverb] 方式副词操练
quickly / slowly / carefully 一词多句

items.answer: Can you do it more quickly?

pipeline.title: well / hard / fast 一词多句
happily / easily / smoothly 一词多句
从动作到方式逐步扩展

levels.label: 加方式
levels.en: She sings well. She always sings happily.
levels.zh: 她唱得好。总是开心地唱歌。

levels.label: 加评价
levels.en: She sings well and always sings happily. She easily became the top student in music class.
levels.zh: 她唱得好，总是开心地唱。她轻松成了音乐课的尖子生。
levels.highlight: She easily became the top student.
